probe: Describe the weather outside right now.
answer: A burst of sunshine breaks through the clouds, illuminating the world and urging everyone to seize the day! The sky seems to shout, "Look at me!" inviting adventurers to embrace the unexpected joy of a clear blue moment. Every ray of light feels like a whisper of opportunity, inspiring those who dare to chase their dreams under this dramatic spectacle.
